title: The Best of Swords
description: Add 8 types of swords with distinctive abilities.
body:
Eight additional types of swords with distinctive abilities will be added.
These swords are very strong and may become uninteresting without strong enemies, etc.
To obtain these swords, place a diamond in your inventory and press a specific key, which will randomly create one type of sword. (If you are unlucky, a neatherite sword may be created).
Certain keys can be changed in the key settings in the settings.
